items.title: 科技公司CEO们显然正饱受人工智能妄想症的困扰

_source_config.name: TechCrunch
_source_config.reason: 创投科技媒体，需筛选AI创业、产品相关

items.ai_target_audience: 关注科技趋势的产品管理者、AI策略制定者、对CEO决策心理感兴趣的设计师
items.ai_key_insights: 文章揭示了科技公司领导层在AI浪潮中普遍存在的认知偏差与过度乐观，反思了技术狂热对产品策略和用户体验可能带来的负面影响，提醒决策者回归用户价值，而非追逐概念。
items.ai_recommendation: 用CEO的集体幻觉警示泡沫风险，帮助设计师理解技术预期与用户体验脱节的根源，值得一读。
items.title_original: 科技公司CEO们显然正饱受人工智能妄想症的困扰
items.title_zh: 科技公司CEO们显然正饱受人工智能妄想症的困扰
items.title_bilingual: 科技公司CEO们显然正饱受人工智能妄想症的困扰

items.title: How to get wired internet without running ethernet cables

_source_config.name: Wired
_source_config.reason: 科技文化媒体，需筛选AI+设计深度报道

items.ai_target_audience: Tech-savvy homeowners, remote workers, online gamers, and general consumers looking to improve home network stability without extensive cabling.
items.ai_key_insights: Explores alternatives like MoCA adapters, powerline networking, and Wi-Fi extenders to achieve wired-like connectivity; details pros/cons, setup steps, and performance considerations for non-Ethernet wired solutions.
items.ai_recommendation: 对于需要稳定高速网络但无法铺设网线的用户，这篇指南清晰对比了电力猫和同轴电缆方案，实用性极强。
items.title_original: How to get wired internet without running ethernet cables
items.title_en: How to get wired internet without running ethernet cables
items.title_zh: 如何在不运行以太网电缆的情况下获得有线互联网
items.title_bilingual: 如何在不运行以太网电缆的情况下获得有线互联网 / How to get wired internet without running ethernet cables

items.title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis

_source_config.name: TechCrunch
_source_config.reason: 创投科技媒体，需筛选AI创业、产品相关

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers and product managers navigating AI-hype driven decisions from leadership
items.ai_key_insights: Executives are increasingly imposing AI features without user-centered validation, creating a gap between technological possibility and actual design value; this can lead to poor user experiences and wasted resources. The article highlights the need for designers to ground AI implementation in real-world utility.
items.ai_recommendation: 这篇内容深入揭露了高管AI妄想对产品设计的冲击，提醒设计师警惕技术追捧而忽视用户真实需求的风险。
items.title_original: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
items.title_en: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
items.title_zh: 科技公司CEO们显然正饱受人工智能妄想症的困扰
items.title_bilingual: 科技公司CEO们显然正饱受人工智能妄想症的困扰 / Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis

items.title: Drone Ports and Funding Mayhem: Trump's Ballroom Has Turned Toxic

_source_config.name: Wired
_source_config.reason: 科技文化媒体，需筛选AI+设计深度报道

items.ai_target_audience: lecteurs de Wired intéressés par l'intersection entre technologie, financement gouvernemental et climat politique sous Trump
items.ai_key_insights: L'article examine comment les promesses de ports pour drones et les incertitudes de financement créent un environnement toxique, mêlant enjeux technologiques et chaos politique.
items.ai_recommendation: 虽设计关联有限，但以无人机港为案例揭示了政策动荡如何影响科技落地，为理解技术生态提供宏观视角。
items.title_original: Drone Ports and Funding Mayhem: Trump's Ballroom Has Turned Toxic
items.title_en: Drone Ports and Funding Mayhem: Trump's Ballroom Has Turned Toxic

items.title_bilingual: 无人机端口和资金混乱：特朗普的舞厅已变得有毒 / Drone Ports and Funding Mayhem: Trump's Ballroom Has Turned Toxic

items.title: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track

_source_config.name: TechCrunch
_source_config.reason: 创投科技媒体，需筛选AI创业、产品相关

items.ai_target_audience: Tech enthusiasts, music producers, AI researchers, and creative professionals interested in the intersection of generative AI and audio.
items.ai_key_insights: ElevenLabs expands from voice synthesis into music generation with a model that can dynamically switch genres mid-track, demonstrating multimodal AI advances and opening new possibilities for adaptive soundtracks and interactive media.
items.ai_recommendation: 这篇报道展示了AI音乐生成的最新交互可能性，为设计动态音频界面或沉浸式体验的设计师提供了前沿技术启发。
items.title_original: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
items.title_en: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
items.title_zh: ElevenLabs 的新音乐生成模型可以在中途切换流派
items.title_bilingual: ElevenLabs 的新音乐生成模型可以在中途切换流派 / ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track

items.title: This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: Tech-savvy homeowners, smart home enthusiasts, bird watchers, and UI/UX designers interested in IoT product experiences.
items.ai_key_insights: The article highlights how a smart bird feeder's camera, AI identification, and companion app transform backyard birdwatching. It emphasizes user experience details such as motion detection accuracy, notification relevance, app interface usability, and data privacy considerations, offering practical insights for designing consumer IoT devices.
items.ai_recommendation: 这篇文章深入剖析了智能观鸟器的交互设计与用户体验，为设计师提供了关于物联网产品情感化设计和日常场景融合的鲜活案例。
items.title_original: This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama
items.title_en: This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama
items.title_zh: 这款智能喂鸟器捕捉到了我后院的更多戏剧
items.title_bilingual: 这款智能喂鸟器捕捉到了我后院的更多戏剧 / This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama

items.title: Xreal’s New $299 ‘xbx’ Smart Glasses Channel Xbox Vibes

_source_config.name: Wired
_source_config.reason: 科技文化媒体，需筛选AI+设计深度报道

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers and product developers interested in spatial computing, gaming interfaces, and emerging wearable display design.
items.ai_key_insights: Xreal's xbx glasses merge Xbox-inspired aesthetics with consumer AR technology, offering a $299 head-worn display that projects a virtual screen. This creates new UX challenges around field-of-view comfort, spatial anchoring, and controller integration, while hinting at console-level immersion in a lightweight form factor.
items.ai_recommendation: 文章揭示Xbox风格AR眼镜在游戏界面与穿戴体验上的设计融合，为UI/UX设计师提供虚实交互新思路与平价硬件参考。
items.title_original: Xreal’s New $299 ‘xbx’ Smart Glasses Channel Xbox Vibes
items.title_en: Xreal’s New $299 ‘xbx’ Smart Glasses Channel Xbox Vibes
items.title_zh: Xreal 售价 299 美元的新款“xbx”智能眼镜频道 Xbox Vibes
items.title_bilingual: Xreal 售价 299 美元的新款“xbx”智能眼镜频道 Xbox Vibes / Xreal’s New $299 ‘xbx’ Smart Glasses Channel Xbox Vibes

items.title: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers, product managers, and technologists interested in how platforms handle AI content disclosure through thoughtful interface design.
items.ai_key_insights: YouTube’s new AI labels are being placed in prominent, user-visible locations (e.g., directly on the video player or description expander) rather than hidden in menus, reflecting a design strategy that prioritizes transparency and immediate recognition. The article likely details placement choices, user trust considerations, and how visual hierarchy affects noticeability, offering a concrete case study in designing for AI disclosure without disrupting the viewing experience.
items.ai_recommendation: 该文章揭示了YouTube如何通过将AI标签置于用户视线自然停留处来提升透明度的界面设计策略，为处理敏感信息展示提供了可借鉴的布局与视觉层级思路。
items.title_original: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them
items.title_en: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them
items.title_zh: YouTube 将人工智能标签放在您实际看到的地方
items.title_bilingual: YouTube 将人工智能标签放在您实际看到的地方 / YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them

items.title: 教皇没对AGI上头

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: 关注AI伦理与社会影响的科技从业者、政策观察者及对梵蒂冈立场感兴趣的读者
items.ai_key_insights: 教皇方济各在G7峰会上关于AI的发言重点在于伦理与人文关怀，而非技术狂热，强调AI需服务于人类尊严和共同福祉，并非无条件拥抱AGI。
items.ai_recommendation: 这篇短文帮你跳出技术泡沫，从全球宗教领袖视角冷静审视AGI的伦理边界，适合设计伦理思考。
